tasks.subject: Refactor search functions to accept limit/offset params
tasks.description: Change symbol::search, content::search to accept limit: Option<usize>, offset: usize. Remove hardcoded MAX_MATCHES truncation. Raise EARLY_QUIT to WALKER_SAFETY_LIMIT=5000. SearchResult gets has_more, offset fields.

tasks.subject: Add --offset flag to CLI, update --limit to apply globally
tasks.description: Add --offset N to main.rs. Make --limit work for all search modes (not just callers). Default limit=25 for search, None for --files mode. Pass through to search functions.

tasks.subject: Update MCP to pass limit/offset from tool params
tasks.description: Add limit and offset optional params to tilth_search MCP tool. Pass through to search functions.

tasks.subject: Update --files mode to use no cap by default
tasks.description: run_files() passes limit=None so it scans everything. Output is just paths, very small per match.

tasks.subject: Test pagination on all 7 repos
tasks.description: Build release, run local_tests, manual test limit/offset/--files on ghidra and PrestaShop to verify no cutoff.
